ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genetic_strains" (
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic strain */,
  "strain_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the genetic strain */,
  "best_match" TEXT /* The best match classification for the strain based on analysis */,
  "similarity_coefficient_calculation" TEXT /* Description of the similarity coefficient calculation method */,
  "f_value" REAL /* The F-value indicating the similarity between genetic sequences */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Detailed classification of the genetic strain */,
  "strain_description" TEXT /* Description of the genetic strain */,
  "gene_sequence" TEXT /* The actual gene sequence */,
  "species" TEXT /* The species the genetic strain belongs to */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the strain_id in genetic_strains */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of analysis */,
  "similarity_coefficient" REAL /* Similarity coefficient calculated */,
  "f_value" REAL /* F-value indicating similarity between genetic sequences */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Detailed classification of the genetic strain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_comparison_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence comparison method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the sequence comparison method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the sequence comparison method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the user_id in users */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strain_method_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "strain_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the strain_id in genetic_strains */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the method_id in sequence_comparison_methods */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of analysis */,
  "similarity_coefficient" REAL /* Similarity coefficient calculated */,
  "f_value" REAL /* F-value indicating similarity between genetic sequences */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Detailed classification of the genetic strain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)
